name: Vegetarian Bean Chili
instructions: ["Chop the vegetables and season the main protein or legumes.","Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until soft.","Add the protein, legumes or vegetables and brown lightly if needed.","Add tomato, stock and spices, then simmer gently.","Cook until the sauce thickens and everything is tender.","Serve with rice, potatoes or bread as preferred."]

name: Vegan Three-Bean Chili
instructions: ["Chop the vegetables and season the main protein or legumes.","Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until soft.","Add the protein, legumes or vegetables and brown lightly if needed.","Add tomato, stock and spices, then simmer gently.","Cook until the sauce thickens and everything is tender.","Serve with rice, potatoes or bread as preferred."]

name: Mushroom and Spinach Risotto with Olive Oil
imgQ: Mushroom and Spinach Risotto with Olive Oil recipe
instructions: ["Warm the stock in a separate pan.","Sauté onion, garlic and mushrooms in olive oil.","Add rice and toast for 1 minute.","Add stock gradually, stirring often.","Cook until creamy and the rice is tender.","Finish with herbs, olive oil and black pepper."]

name: Tomato and Basil Gnocchi
instructions: ["Preheat the oven to 190°C.","Prepare the sauce, vegetables and main protein or legumes.","Combine everything in a baking dish with the chosen carb.","Cover and bake until bubbling and tender.","Uncover for the final minutes to brown the top lightly.","Rest briefly before serving."]

name: Spinach and Mushroom Cannellini Bean Bake
imgQ: Spinach and Mushroom Cannellini Bean Bake recipe
instructions: ["Preheat the oven to 190°C.","Prepare the sauce, vegetables and main protein or legumes.","Combine everything in a baking dish with the chosen carb.","Cover and bake until bubbling and tender.","Uncover for the final minutes to brown the top lightly.","Rest briefly before serving."]

name: Lentil Bolognese
instructions: ["Cook the pasta until al dente.","Sauté onion, garlic and vegetables in olive oil.","Add legumes or protein and cook through.","Stir in tomato sauce and simmer until thickened.","Toss pasta with the sauce and loosen with pasta water if needed.","Serve with herbs and black pepper."]

name: Mushroom Coconut Stroganoff
instructions: ["Prepare and chop all ingredients.","Heat oil in a large pan and sauté the aromatics.","Add the main protein or vegetables and cook until browned.","Add sauce, seasoning and a splash of water if needed.","Simmer or toss until everything is cooked through.","Serve hot with the suggested side."]

name: Lentil Shepherd’s Pie
instructions: ["Preheat the oven to 190°C.","Prepare the sauce, vegetables and main protein or legumes.","Combine everything in a baking dish with the chosen carb.","Cover and bake until bubbling and tender.","Uncover for the final minutes to brown the top lightly.","Rest briefly before serving."]

name: Courgette Lemon Pasta
instructions: ["Cook the pasta until al dente.","Sauté onion, garlic and vegetables in olive oil.","Add legumes or protein and cook through.","Stir in tomato sauce and simmer until thickened.","Toss pasta with the sauce and loosen with pasta water if needed.","Serve with herbs and black pepper."]

name: Roasted Vegetable Pasta Bake
instructions: ["Preheat the oven to 200°C.","Cut vegetables and protein into similar-sized pieces.","Toss everything with oil, garlic, herbs and seasoning.","Spread on a tray in a single layer.","Roast until golden and cooked through, turning once.","Serve with rice, potatoes or a simple salad."]

name: Broccoli and Garlic Rice Bake
imgQ: Broccoli and Garlic Rice Bake recipe
instructions: ["Preheat the oven to 190°C.","Prepare the sauce, vegetables and main protein or legumes.","Combine everything in a baking dish with the chosen carb.","Cover and bake until bubbling and tender.","Uncover for the final minutes to brown the top lightly.","Rest briefly before serving."]

name: Overnight oats with banana and honey
instructions: ["The night before: combine oats and oat milk in a jar or bowl, stir well.", "Cover and refrigerate overnight \u2014 oats will absorb the liquid and thicken.", "In the morning, give it a stir. Top with sliced banana and a drizzle of honey."]

name: Yogurt with granola, strawberries and honey
instructions: ["Spoon yogurt into a bowl.", "Halve the strawberries. Scatter granola on top of the yogurt, then the strawberries.", "Drizzle with honey and serve immediately so the granola stays crunchy."]

name: Yogurt with granola, mango and honey
instructions: ["Spoon yogurt into a bowl.", "Top with granola and mango chunks.", "Drizzle with honey. Serve immediately."]

name: Toast with tuna paste and boiled eggs
instructions: ["Batch tip: hard-boil 6\u20138 eggs on Sunday and keep them in the fridge all week \u2014 peel as needed.", "Mix drained tuna with olive oil and finely diced red onion to make the paste. Season with salt and pepper.", "Toast the bread. Spread tuna paste generously and serve with 2 halved boiled eggs."]

name: Toast with avocado and boiled eggs
instructions: ["Toast the bread.", "Mash the avocado with a fork, season with salt and black pepper.", "Spread avocado thickly on toast. Serve with 2 batch-boiled eggs on the side, halved."]

name: Protein shake with banana and soaked oats
instructions: ["Pour oat milk into a glass or bowl. Whisk in protein powder until no lumps remain.", "Stir in rolled oats and leave for 2\u20133 minutes to soak slightly.", "Slice the banana on top and eat immediately."]

name: Rice cakes with tuna paste and cucumber
instructions: ["Drain the tuna and mix with olive oil and a pinch of salt.", "Spread tuna paste onto each rice cake.", "Slice cucumber into rounds and serve alongside."]

name: Toast with peanut butter, banana and honey
instructions: ["Toast the bread.", "Spread peanut butter evenly on each slice.", "Top with sliced banana and a drizzle of honey."]

name: Granola with oat milk and mixed berries
instructions: ["Pour granola into a bowl.", "Add oat milk \u2014 eat immediately for crunch, or leave 5 minutes for softer oats.", "Top with mixed berries and serve."]

name: Overnight chia pudding with mango
instructions: ["The night before: combine chia seeds, oat milk and honey in a jar. Stir vigorously.", "Stir again after 5 minutes to prevent clumping. Cover and refrigerate overnight.", "In the morning, the pudding should be thick and creamy. Top with mango chunks."]

name: Toast with smoked salmon and avocado
instructions: ["Toast the bread.", "Mash avocado with a fork and season with salt and black pepper. Spread on the toast.", "Lay smoked salmon over the avocado. Serve with cucumber slices on the side."]

name: Yogurt with protein powder, granola and berries
instructions: ["Add protein powder to the yogurt. Mix with a spoon until fully combined and smooth.", "Top with granola and mixed berries. Serve immediately."]

name: Bircher muesli with grated apple
instructions: ["Grate the apple (skin on is fine). Combine with oats, oat milk and cinnamon.", "Stir well, cover and refrigerate overnight.", "In the morning, stir and eat cold. Add a splash more oat milk if it looks too thick."]

name: Rice cakes with peanut butter, banana and honey
instructions: ["Spread peanut butter over each rice cake.", "Top with sliced banana rounds.", "Drizzle with honey and eat straight away."]

name: Boiled eggs with toast and tomato
instructions: ["Use batch-boiled eggs from the fridge \u2014 peel and halve them.", "Toast the bread. Season the eggs with salt and plenty of black pepper.", "Serve with thick slices of tomato on the side."]

name: Rice cakes with smoked salmon and cucumber
instructions: ["Layer smoked salmon on each rice cake.", "Slice cucumber thinly and place on top.", "Scatter capers over the top and serve."]

name: Yogurt with acai, granola and banana
instructions: ["Stir acai powder into the yogurt until evenly purple and smooth.", "Top with granola and sliced banana. Serve immediately."]

name: Toast with hummus, tomato, cucumber and eggs
instructions: ["Toast the bread. Spread hummus generously over each slice.", "Top with sliced tomato and cucumber rounds. Season with salt and pepper.", "Serve alongside 2 batch-boiled eggs, halved."]

name: Protein berry smoothie
instructions: ["Add all ingredients to a blender.", "Blend on high for 45 seconds until completely smooth.", "Pour into a glass and drink immediately."]

name: Double yogurt with honey, walnuts and grapes
instructions: ["Pour yogurt into a bowl.", "Roughly break the walnuts. Scatter walnuts and grapes on top.", "Drizzle with honey and serve."]

name: Arroz de frango
instructions: ["Dice the red pepper and courgette. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat, add garlic and soften 1 min.", "Add the vegetables and cook 3\u20134 minutes until slightly tender.", "Add shredded chicken and cooked rice. Stir everything together, season well and heat through for 2 minutes."]

name: Caldo verde with crusty bread
instructions: ["Batch prep: boil diced potato in stock until very soft (15 min). Use a hand blender to blitz smooth.", "Finely shred the kale. Slice the chouri\u00e7o into thin rounds.", "Reheat a portion of soup. Stir in kale and chouri\u00e7o, simmer 3 min until kale wilts. Serve with toasted bread."]

name: Asian chicken noodle soup
instructions: ["Simmer chicken breast in 400ml water with sliced ginger and garlic for 10\u201312 min. Remove and shred.", "Soft-boil the egg in a separate pot for 6\u20137 minutes; run under cold water and peel.", "Cook noodles per packet. Season the broth with soy sauce. Assemble: noodles in the broth, top with shredded chicken, bok choy (it wilts in the hot broth) and halved egg."]

name: Tuna pasta
instructions: ["Cook pasta in salted boiling water until al dente (check packet). Reserve a splash of pasta water.", "While pasta cooks, warm olive oil in a pan. Add sliced garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant. Add passata and simmer 5 min. Season.", "Drain pasta and add to the sauce with drained tuna. Toss well, adding a splash of pasta water to loosen if needed."]

name: Salmon bowl with roasted veg
instructions: ["Slice courgette and carrot into batons. Toss with a little olive oil and roast at 200\u00b0C for 20 min until golden edges appear.", "Season salmon with salt and pan-fry skin-side down in a dry pan 3\u20134 min, flip and cook 2\u20133 min more. It should flake easily.", "Serve salmon and vegetables over rice. Drizzle with soy sauce and a few drops of sesame oil."]

name: Bifana
instructions: ["Marinate pork: combine minced garlic, white wine vinegar, paprika and a pinch of salt. Coat the pork and leave at least 30 min (or overnight in the fridge).", "Heat olive oil in a heavy pan on high heat. Cook pork 2\u20133 min each side until golden and cooked through.", "Rest the pork for 1 min, then slice and place in the roll. Spoon the pan juices over the meat."]

name: Sardines on toast with tomato salad
instructions: ["Toast the bread.", "Lay sardines across the toast. Slice the tomato and drizzle everything with olive oil.", "Serve with mixed leaves on the side dressed with a splash of vinegar."]

name: Prawn stir fry with rice
instructions: ["Get a wok or large pan very hot. Add a little oil, then fry minced garlic and grated ginger for 30 seconds.", "Add prawns in a single layer and cook without stirring for 1 min until they start to turn pink. Stir and cook 1\u20132 min more.", "Add stir-fry vegetables and toss 2 min. Add soy sauce and rice, toss everything together and serve hot."]

name: Asian beef mince bowl
instructions: ["Heat a pan on high. Add mince and cook, breaking it apart, until browned all over (4\u20135 min). Drain excess fat.", "Add minced garlic and grated ginger, stir 30 seconds. Add soy sauce and toss to coat.", "Serve over rice, topped with sliced spring onions."]

name: Chicken udon soup
instructions: ["Poach chicken breast in 400ml water with a pinch of salt for 10\u201312 min. Remove, shred and keep the broth.", "Slice mushrooms and cook them in the broth for 3 min.", "Cook udon noodles per packet. Stir miso paste into the hot broth off the heat (don't boil miso). Season with soy. Assemble in a bowl: noodles, chicken, mushrooms, broth. Top with sliced spring onions."]

name: Soba noodle salad with chicken
instructions: ["Cook soba noodles per packet (usually 4\u20135 min). Rinse immediately under cold water and drain \u2014 this stops cooking and removes starch.", "Pan-fry or grill chicken breast 6\u20137 min each side. Rest 2 min then slice.", "Julienne the cucumber and carrot into thin matchsticks. Toss noodles and vegetables with soy sauce and sesame oil. Top with sliced chicken."]

name: Bacalhau com batatas
instructions: ["Cut potato into chunks. Boil in salted water 12\u201315 min until fork-tender. Drain.", "Poach the desalted cod in barely simmering water for 8\u201310 min until it flakes easily. Hard-boil the egg separately.", "Flake the cod onto a plate with the potato slices. Drizzle generously with olive oil and add sliced garlic. Top with halved egg. Season with pepper."]

name: Chicken and chouriço rice
instructions: ["Slice chouri\u00e7o into thin rounds and fry in a dry pan until the edges crisp (2 min). Remove and set aside.", "In the same pan, fry diced bell pepper 2 min. Add passata and simmer 3 min.", "Shred the cooked chicken. Add chicken, chouri\u00e7o and rice to the pan. Stir well and heat through for 2 min."]

name: Miso ramen with egg and sweetcorn
instructions: ["Soft-boil the egg: 6 min in boiling water, then transfer to cold water. Peel and halve.", "Cook ramen noodles per packet. In a bowl, dissolve miso paste in 300ml just-boiled water. Season with soy sauce.", "Add noodles to the broth. Top with sweetcorn, halved egg and nori sheet."]

name: Bean and chouriço stew
instructions: ["Slice chouri\u00e7o into rounds. Heat olive oil in a pan and fry chouri\u00e7o until slightly crispy (2 min).", "Add sliced garlic and cook 30 seconds. Add passata and beans, stir to combine and simmer 5 min.", "Tear in the kale leaves and simmer 3 more min until wilted. Season with salt and pepper."]

name: Grilled chicken wrap
instructions: ["Season chicken with salt, pepper and paprika. Grill or pan-fry over medium-high heat 6\u20137 min each side until cooked through. Rest 2 min, then slice.", "Warm the tortilla briefly in a dry pan or microwave (20 sec).", "Spread hummus in the centre of the tortilla. Layer with leaves, roasted peppers and sliced chicken. Fold and roll tightly."]

name: Portuguese salmon and potato salad
instructions: ["Boil potato (diced into 2cm cubes) in salted water for 12\u201315 min until just tender. Drain and cool for 5 min.", "Slice red onion very thinly.", "Flake canned salmon into a bowl. Add warm potato, red onion, olive oil and vinegar. Toss gently and season well."]

name: Cod fishcakes
instructions: ["Boil diced potato until very soft (15 min). In a separate pan, simmer cod in water 8 min until it flakes easily. Drain both.", "Mash potato and cod together. Add finely sliced spring onions and minced garlic. Season well. The mixture should hold its shape.", "Form 2\u20133 round patties. Heat olive oil in a pan and fry 3\u20134 min each side until golden and crispy. Serve with a green salad."]

name: Miso glazed salmon with rice and bok choy
ingredients: [{"name": "Salmon fillet", "amount": 180, "unit": "g"}, {"name": "Cooked rice", "amount": 100, "unit": "g"}, {"name": "Bok choy", "amount": 150, "unit": "g"}, {"name": "Miso paste", "amount": 1, "unit": "tbsp"}, {"name": "Soy sauce", "amount": 1, "unit": "tbsp"}, {"name": "Sesame oil", "amount": 1, "unit": "tsp"}]
instructions: ["Mix miso paste and soy sauce into a smooth glaze. Brush over the top of the salmon.", "Grill or bake at 200\u00b0C for 12\u201315 min until the glaze caramelises and the salmon flakes when pressed.", "While salmon cooks, stir-fry bok choy in sesame oil over high heat 2\u20133 min until leaves wilt and stems soften. Serve over rice."]

name: Bacalhau a Bras
instructions: ["Cut potato into very thin strips (matchstick size). Fry in olive oil until crispy and golden, then set aside on paper towel.", "In the same pan, saut\u00e9 sliced garlic, add shredded cod and cook 2 min. Add potato strips back in.", "Beat eggs with a pinch of salt and pour over the mixture. Stir gently on low heat until just set \u2014 it should be soft, not dry. Finish with fresh parsley."]

name: Arroz de pato
instructions: ["Batch prep: braise duck leg in stock with bay leaf and garlic in the oven at 160\u00b0C for 1 hour. Shred meat, discard bones.", "Mix shredded duck with cooked rice and chouri\u00e7o slices. Spread in a small oven dish. Drizzle with a little duck cooking fat.", "Bake uncovered at 190\u00b0C for 10\u201312 min until the top is golden and slightly crispy."]

name: Frango no churrasco with sweet potato
instructions: ["Mix garlic (minced), paprika, vinegar, olive oil and salt. Coat chicken thighs thoroughly and marinate at least 30 min.", "Peel sweet potato, cut into wedges and roast at 200\u00b0C for 25 min, turning once halfway.", "Grill or pan-fry chicken thighs on high heat 6\u20137 min each side until the skin is charred and juices run clear. Rest 3 min before serving."]

name: Pork tenderloin with roasted potato and veg
instructions: ["Cut potato into chunks, courgette and pepper into wedges. Toss with olive oil, minced garlic, salt and pepper. Roast at 200\u00b0C for 20\u201325 min, turning once.", "Season pork tenderloin with salt, pepper and paprika. Heat a pan very hot and sear 3 min on each of 3 sides until golden all over.", "Let pork rest 5 min (it will finish cooking internally). Slice and serve with roasted vegetables."]

name: Prawn coconut curry
instructions: ["Heat a pan over medium heat. Fry curry paste and minced garlic for 1 min until fragrant \u2014 it will splutter.", "Pour in coconut milk and stir to combine. Simmer 5 min to thicken slightly. Add prawns and cook 2\u20133 min until pink throughout.", "Add spinach and stir until wilted (1 min). Season with salt. Serve over rice."]

name: Gyudon Japanese beef rice bowl
instructions: ["Slice the onion into thin half-moons. Simmer in soy sauce, mirin, honey and 100ml water for 3\u20134 min until onions soften.", "Add thin beef slices and cook 2\u20133 min, stirring, until the beef is just cooked and the sauce has thickened slightly.", "Pour beef and onions directly over a bowl of rice. Spoon over the remaining sauce."]

name: Portuguese grilled sea bass with potato
instructions: ["Boil or roast potato until golden. Score the sea bass skin with a sharp knife \u2014 this prevents curling.", "Heat a pan until very hot. Add olive oil and lay sea bass skin-side down. Press gently with a spatula. Cook 3\u20134 min until skin is crispy, then flip and cook 2 min more.", "Rub sliced garlic over the potato while still warm. Serve fish alongside potatoes and dressed salad."]

name: Chicken and mushroom noodles
instructions: ["Cook noodles per packet. Drain, rinse and set aside.", "Slice chicken breast thinly. Stir-fry in a hot wok with a little oil 4\u20135 min until cooked. Remove.", "Stir-fry sliced mushrooms and garlic 3 min. Return chicken, add noodles, soy sauce and oyster sauce. Toss on high heat 2 min until everything is coated."]

name: Spiced lamb mince with rice
instructions: ["Brown lamb mince in a hot pan over high heat, breaking it apart as it cooks (4\u20135 min). Drain excess fat.", "Add minced garlic, cumin, coriander and cinnamon. Stir and cook 1 min until fragrant.", "Pour in passata and simmer 8\u201310 min until sauce thickens. Season well. Serve over rice."]

name: Stuffed peppers with mince and rice
ingredients: [{"name": "Chicken or beef mince", "amount": 200, "unit": "g"}, {"name": "Cooked rice", "amount": 100, "unit": "g"}, {"name": "Bell peppers", "amount": 2, "unit": "pcs"}, {"name": "Tomato passata", "amount": 100, "unit": "ml"}, {"name": "Garlic", "amount": 2, "unit": "cloves"}, {"name": "Olive oil", "amount": 1, "unit": "tbsp"}]
instructions: ["Preheat oven to 190\u00b0C. Halve peppers lengthways and remove seeds. Place cut-side up in a baking dish.", "Brown mince with garlic and olive oil (4 min). Add passata and simmer 3 min. Stir in rice and season.", "Fill each pepper half with the mince mixture. Bake 20\u201325 min until peppers are tender and the top has slightly dried."]

name: Cod in tomato sauce with pasta
instructions: ["Cook pasta in salted boiling water until al dente. Reserve a small cup of pasta water before draining.", "While pasta cooks, saut\u00e9 sliced garlic in olive oil 30 seconds. Add passata and simmer 5 min. Season.", "Add cod fillet whole to the sauce. Cover and cook 7\u20138 min until it flakes apart easily. Break it up gently with a spoon, then toss in the drained pasta. Loosen with pasta water if needed. Finish with fresh parsley."]

name: Duck breast with sweet potato
instructions: ["Score the duck skin in a crosshatch pattern (cuts fat, helps rendering). Season with salt. Place skin-side down in a cold pan \u2014 turn heat to medium. Cook 8\u201310 min, pouring off fat as it renders.", "Flip and cook the flesh side 4\u20135 min. Rest 5 min on a board. While resting, roast diced sweet potato at 200\u00b0C (start earlier \u2014 needs 25 min).", "Stir-fry bok choy in sesame oil 2 min. Mix soy and honey for a glaze. Slice duck and drizzle glaze over. Serve with sweet potato and bok choy."]

name: Oven baked pork belly with rice
instructions: ["Score the pork belly skin. Mix minced garlic, grated ginger, soy and honey into a marinade. Rub all over the pork and leave 30 min minimum.", "Roast at 190\u00b0C for 40 min, basting with the pan juices halfway through. The skin should be golden and sticky.", "Rest 5 min before slicing. Serve over rice with any resting juices drizzled on top."]

name: Salmon teriyaki with rice and broccoli
instructions: ["Mix soy sauce and honey to make the teriyaki glaze. Brush half over the salmon.", "Pan-fry salmon skin-side down in a hot pan 3\u20134 min. Flip, brush with remaining glaze and cook 2 more min. The glaze should caramelise.", "Steam broccoli 4\u20135 min until just tender. Serve salmon over rice with broccoli alongside. Scatter sesame seeds over the fish."]

name: Grilled chicken thighs with sweet potato
instructions: ["Rub chicken thighs with paprika, minced garlic, olive oil and salt. Cut sweet potato and courgette into chunks.", "Roast vegetables at 200\u00b0C for 25 min. Grill or pan-fry chicken thighs on medium-high heat 6\u20138 min each side until the skin is crispy and internal juices run clear.", "Rest chicken 5 min before serving alongside the roasted vegetables."]

name: Tuna paste with rice cakes
instructions: ["Drain tuna and mix with olive oil and a pinch of salt.", "Spread over rice cakes. Can be batch-prepped on Sunday and kept in the fridge in a sealed container."]

name: Boiled eggs with rice cakes
instructions: ["Use batch-boiled eggs from the fridge \u2014 peel and halve.", "Season with salt and pepper. Eat alongside rice cakes."]

name: Protein shake with banana
instructions: ["Shake protein powder with water or oat milk in a shaker bottle until smooth.", "Eat the banana alongside the shake."]

name: Yogurt with granola and honey
instructions: ["Spoon yogurt into a bowl or eat straight from the container.", "Top with granola and a drizzle of honey."]

name: Ryvita crackers with tuna
instructions: ["Drain tuna and mix with olive oil and a pinch of salt.", "Spread over Ryvita crackers."]

name: Rice cakes with smoked salmon and cucumber
instructions: ["Lay smoked salmon on each rice cake.", "Top with thin cucumber slices."]

name: Protein shake with oats
instructions: ["Mix protein powder into oat milk in a glass.", "Stir in rolled oats and leave 2\u20133 min to absorb slightly before drinking."]

name: Toast with tuna paste
instructions: ["Toast the bread.", "Mix drained tuna with olive oil and a pinch of salt. Spread over toast."]

name: Sardines on toast
instructions: ["Toast the bread.", "Layer sardines on toast. Top with sliced tomato and a drizzle of olive oil."]

name: Batch chicken strips with rice cakes
instructions: ["Use batch-cooked chicken breast from the fridge. Slice or eat as strips.", "Serve alongside rice cakes. Season with salt and pepper or a little soy sauce."]

name: Peanut butter with banana and rice cakes
instructions: ["Spread peanut butter over the rice cakes.", "Eat alongside sliced banana."]

name: Hummus with pitta and cucumber
instructions: ["Warm the pitta briefly in a toaster and cut into strips.", "Slice cucumber into sticks. Serve hummus as a dip with pitta and cucumber."]

name: Full tin tuna with Ryvita
instructions: ["Drain tuna, drizzle with olive oil and season.", "Eat directly from the can alongside Ryvita crackers."]

name: Protein shake
instructions: ["Add protein powder and water to a shaker bottle.", "Shake vigorously for 10\u201315 seconds until no lumps remain."]

name: Toast with avocado and boiled egg
instructions: ["Toast the bread. Mash the avocado with a fork and season with salt and pepper.", "Spread avocado on toast. Top with a batch-boiled egg, halved."]

name: Three boiled eggs
instructions: ["Use batch-boiled eggs from the fridge. Peel and season with salt and pepper."]

name: Yogurt with protein powder and berries
instructions: ["Stir protein powder into yogurt until fully combined and smooth.", "Top with mixed berries."]

name: Rice cakes with peanut butter
instructions: ["Spread peanut butter evenly over each rice cake."]

name: Sardines with Ryvita crackers
instructions: ["Open the sardine tin. Serve directly alongside Ryvita crackers."]

name: Smoked salmon with rice cakes and cucumber
instructions: ["Lay smoked salmon on rice cakes.", "Slice cucumber and add on top or on the side."]

name: Yogurt with strawberries and honey
instructions: ["Halve the strawberries. Top yogurt with the strawberries and a drizzle of honey."]

name: Dark chocolate with grapes
instructions: ["Break chocolate into squares and eat alongside fresh grapes."]

name: Frozen banana nice cream
instructions: ["Peel and freeze ripe bananas the night before (key step \u2014 the riper the better).", "Break frozen bananas into chunks and blend in a food processor on high until smooth, creamy and ice-cream-like. Serve immediately."]

name: 3 Oreos
instructions: ["Enjoy 3 Oreos. Oreos are lactose-free."]

name: Mango sorbet
instructions: ["Scoop straight from the tub and serve."]

name: Yogurt with honey and granola
instructions: ["Top yogurt with granola and a drizzle of honey."]

name: Mixed berries with honey drizzle
instructions: ["Place berries in a bowl. Drizzle with honey."]

name: Oat milk rice pudding
instructions: ["Combine cooked rice, oat milk and honey in a small saucepan.", "Simmer on low heat 5 min, stirring often, until thick and creamy. Dust with cinnamon before serving.", "Batch tip: make a full portion on Sunday and reheat through the week."]

name: Banana with peanut butter and honey
instructions: ["Slice banana into rounds. Top with small dollops of peanut butter and a drizzle of honey."]

name: Coconut chia pudding with mango
instructions: ["Mix chia seeds, coconut milk and honey. Stir well and refrigerate at least 2 hours or overnight.", "Top with mango chunks before serving."]

name: Microwave baked apple with cinnamon
instructions: ["Core the apple with a knife or spoon. Fill the cavity with cinnamon and honey.", "Place on a microwave-safe plate. Microwave on high for 3 minutes until soft throughout."]

name: Frozen mango chunks
instructions: ["Take directly from the freezer and eat as-is \u2014 texture is like a sorbet."]

name: Dark chocolate with strawberries
instructions: ["Break chocolate into squares. Eat alongside whole or halved strawberries."]

name: No-bake peanut butter oat balls
instructions: ["Mix all ingredients together in a bowl until a sticky dough forms. If too dry, add a tiny splash of water.", "Roll into 6 equal balls. Place on a plate and refrigerate for 15 min to firm up.", "Batch-make 12 balls on Sunday (double the recipe). Eat 2 per serving \u2014 keeps 5 days in the fridge."]

name: Oat milk hot chocolate with biscuits
instructions: ["Heat oat milk in a small saucepan until steaming (do not boil).", "Add cocoa powder and honey. Whisk vigorously until smooth and frothy.", "Pour into a mug and serve with 2 plain biscuits on the side."]

name: Melon and grapes bowl
instructions: ["Cut melon into cubes and combine with grapes in a bowl."]

name: Coconut yogurt with mango and granola
instructions: ["Spoon coconut yogurt into a bowl.", "Top with mango chunks and granola. Serve immediately."]

name: Mango sorbet with mixed berries
instructions: ["Scoop sorbet into a bowl.", "Top with fresh or thawed mixed berries."]

name: Alpro chocolate dessert pot
instructions: ["Open and eat straight from the pot."]

name: Banana with peanut butter and dark chocolate chips
instructions: ["Slice banana into rounds. Top each slice with a small dab of peanut butter.", "Scatter dark chocolate chips over the top."]

name: Oat milk hot chocolate with biscuits
instructions: ["Heat oat milk. Whisk in cocoa powder and honey until smooth.", "Serve with 2 plain biscuits on the side."]

name: Melon and grapes bowl
instructions: ["Cube melon. Combine with grapes in a bowl."]

name: Coconut yogurt with mango and granola
instructions: ["Top coconut yogurt with mango chunks and granola."]

name: Mango sorbet with mixed berries
instructions: ["Scoop sorbet into a bowl.", "Top with fresh or thawed mixed berries."]

name: Alpro chocolate dessert pot
instructions: ["Open and eat straight from the pot."]

name: Banana with peanut butter and dark chocolate chips
instructions: ["Slice banana into rounds.", "Dab peanut butter on each slice and sprinkle with chocolate chips."]
